notes: Fixed close-and-redeem not bumping the savings account. Root cause: the close flow pushed the redemption transaction directly but never called applyTransactionDelta, so creating it didn't credit savings — yet deleting it from the Journal DID call applyTransactionDelta(-1), subtracting. That asymmetry is exactly why closing left savings unchanged while deleting the entry reduced it. Fix: applyTransactionDelta is now exposed and the close flow calls it (+1) right after creating the redemption, identical to the Journal save path. Now closing the RD/FD increases the savings account by the redeemed amount (e.g. 562k -> 720k for a 158k redemption), the investment shows 0 from the close month, and deleting the entry cleanly reverses it.
